intended_use: BriefCase is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software indicated for use in the analysis of cervical spine CT images. The device is intended to assist hospital networks and traine
intended_use_full: BriefCase is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software indicated for use in the analysis of cervical spine CT images. The device is intended to assist hospital networks and trained radiologists in workflow triage by flagging and communication of suspected positive findings of linear lucencies in the cervical spine bone in patterns compatible with fractures.
target_condition: Cervical spine fractures (linear lucencies in the cervical spine bone)
ground_truth: Blinded reviewers (reference standard not explicitly detailed)
other_metrics: Time-to-notification: 3.9 minutes (95% CI: 3.8-4.1); Standard of care time-to-exam-open: 58.4 minutes (95% CI: 45.3-71.4); Mean time difference: 54.4 minutes (95% CI: 41.3-67.5)
